title: Round Fireflies
body:
This small resource pack adds a somewhat round texture to the particles of the firefly bush.

For more info, see gallery.

For any feedback reach out on my discord.

_Square firefly particles are great, but circles upon circles of rouned fireflies are better..!_

# MY OTHER PROJECTS
